rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"error_max_budget_usd can fire during planning/exploration before any source files are written, leaving zero implementation to review","scope":"build stage"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a prior stage exhausts budget in planning, the next stage must minimize exploration and produce a minimal viable implementation immediately","scope":"build stage"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"ioredis is not installed in the environment; any dynamic import of it will fail, triggering the decompose fallback path","scope":"src/cache"}]}
